summary: P0 CRITICAL - VERIFIED: Backend PDF HTML matches Frontend PDF HTML. All 16 tests PASSED. The use_item_discounts flag is correctly passed through the approval flow. The table headers, CSS styles, and content structure are IDENTICAL between backend generate_quote_html and frontend generatePdfHtml functions.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend generate_quote_html (lines 929-1589) is structurally identical to frontend generatePdfHtml (lines 550-1100)
Table headers match EXACTLY: Total Discount mode uses [#, Description, Qty, Unit Price, Amount], Per-Item Discount mode uses [Sr., Item Code, Qty, Rate, Disc %, Value After Disc, Total]
CSS styles are IDENTICAL between backend and frontend PDF generation
use_item_discounts flag correctly passed in send_quote_approval_email (line 3162) and send_quote_revision_email (line 3454)
Customer fields (customer_code, customer_company, customer_details) properly included in email PDF data
Terms & Conditions sections properly rendered in both modes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing quotes including Q/25-26/0038 (recently approved with use_item_discounts=True)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The PDF email attachment bug has been fixed. Backend PDF HTML generation (generate_quote_html) now produces identical output to frontend PDF HTML generation (generatePdfHtml). Key verifications: (1) Table headers match exactly for both Total Discount and Per-Item Discount modes, (2) use_item_discounts flag correctly propagates through approval flow, (3) customer_code, customer_company properly included in PDF. Tested with real approved quotes Q/25-26/0038 and Q/25-26/0039.
